useCases.title: Patient views health dashboard
useCases.description: A patient logs in and sees their aggregated health summary, upcoming appointments, labs, and medications.

useCases.title: Patient views and manages medical records
useCases.description: A patient can browse FHIR-structured records (visits, labs, medications, immunizations) and download them.

useCases.title: Patient manages consent grants
useCases.description: A patient grants, views, and revokes consent for third-party access to their PHI.

useCases.title: Patient books and manages appointments
useCases.description: A patient can request appointments by specialty and preferred date and view pending/confirmed visits.

useCases.title: Patient views lab results
useCases.description: A patient can view recent lab results with interpretation guidance, flagging attention items.

useCases.title: Patient views medications
useCases.description: A patient can view active medications with dosage, schedule, and adherence information.

useCases.title: Patient views immunization records
useCases.description: A patient can view their immunization history and upcoming due vaccines.

useCases.title: Patient manages documents
useCases.description: A patient can upload, view, and OCR-review health documents (prescriptions, discharge summaries).

useCases.title: Patient views and manages profile
useCases.description: A patient can view and update their demographic information, emergency contacts, and preferred language.

useCases.title: Patient views clinical timeline
useCases.description: A patient can see a chronological timeline of all their health events (visits, labs, medications, immunizations).

useCases.title: Patient views conditions
useCases.description: A patient can see their active and resolved diagnoses with SNOMED codes and clinical notes.

useCases.title: Patient views observations
useCases.description: A patient can view FHIR Observation resources (vitals, BMI, glucose) over time.

useCases.title: Clinician emergency break-glass access
useCases.description: A clinician can request emergency access to a patient's PHI with a stated justification. The access is server-authorized, biometric-gated on mobile, and fully audited.

useCases.title: Admin reviews emergency access events
useCases.description: An admin can review pending and overdue break-glass events and mark them as approved or flagged.

useCases.title: Admin views audit trail
useCases.description: An admin can view the PHI access audit trail with filtering by principal, resource type, and date range.

useCases.title: Caregiver views delegated patient dashboard
useCases.description: A caregiver with an active consent grant can view the patient's dashboard and records on their behalf.

useCases.title: Provider views patient summary
useCases.description: A provider can search for patients, view summaries, and access clinical context for a consultation.

useCases.title: FCHV community health volunteer dashboard
useCases.description: An FCHV (Female Community Health Volunteer) can view assigned community members and register visits.

useCases.title: Patient receives notifications and alerts
useCases.description: A patient receives push notifications for appointment reminders, lab results, and consent expiry.

useCases.title: Patient views insurance and payments
useCases.description: A patient can view their insurance coverage, payment history, and pending claims.
useCases.flagReason: Insurance data integration pending external health fund API agreement

useCases.title: Patient views referrals and imaging
useCases.description: A patient can view specialist referrals and DICOM imaging requests with status.
useCases.flagReason: DICOM viewer integration pending radiology partner agreement
